title: Pairs with Given Difference
hints: Sort the array first to use two pointers approach.
Use two pointers i and j starting from 0 and 1.
If A[j] - A[i] == B, count the pair and move both pointers (skip duplicates).
If A[j] - A[i] < B, move j forward to increase the difference.
If A[j] - A[i] > B, move i forward to decrease the difference.
Handle the case when B == 0 separately (count distinct pairs with same value).
